author: nerdbarbie
description: Ranch Cogs — a collection of custom cogs for Red-DiscordBot.

author: nerdbarbie
cattleguard.description: Automatically assigns a default role to members with no roles, and moves members between roles based on configurable inactivity thresholds. Supports multiple inactivity rules and a scheduled background check.

author: nerdbarbie
ranchintro.short: Welcomes new members when they post their first introduction.
ranchintro.description: Watches a designated introductions channel for a new member's first message, promotes them to an active member role, removes their new member role, and reposts a welcome embed in a public channel crediting the original poster.
